meta.title: SmartExpense Copilot: Your AI Agent for Expense Management
meta.description: Stop wasting hours on expense reports! Folio3 SmartExpense, powered by Microsoft Copilot, automates data entry, ensures compliance, and cuts costs instantly.

items.text: Stop Managing Expenses, Start Leading Finance.

From receipt capture to ERP posting, SmartExpenseCopilot categorizes, validates and syncs every transaction in real time. Reduce expense processing time by up to 80% and ensure audit-ready accuracy in every step.

headings.text: Stop Managing Expenses, Start Leading Finance.

items.text: 90% of finance teams are projected to deploy at least one AI-enabled solution by 2026. Why Wait?
The early adopters are already realizing significant efficiency and insight gains. Future-proof your operations today.
Leverage AI-driven insights to accelerate scenario modeling and unlock proactive, data-backed decision-making. Request a call
Eliminate manual reconciliation and streamline variance analysis to ensure data integrity and audit compliance. REQUEST A CALL
Copilot automates Accounts Receivable by prioritizing high-risk accounts and creating personalized outreach, improving liquidity, and reducing DSO. REQUEST A CALL
Copilot extracts and validates invoice details from PDFs and images against purchase orders and contracts to accelerate your Procure-to-Pay cycle. Request a call
Copilot monitors transactions using machine learning to flag unusual spending in real-time for greater financial control REQUEST A CALL

items.text: Microsoft 365 Copilot drove up to 353% ROI For Companies.

Folio3 SmartExpense Copilot is a specialized, end-to-end Financial Intelligence Agent designed for the dynamic, and complex workflows of the Office of the CFO, easily integrating withERP, GL, and BI systems.

headings.text: Microsoft 365 Copilot drove up to 353% ROI For Companies.

paragraphs: Folio3 SmartExpense Copilot is a specialized, end-to-end Financial Intelligence Agent designed for the dynamic, and complex workflows of the Office of the CFO, easily integrating withERP, GL, and BI systems.

items.text: The Folio3 SmartExpense Copilot integrates seamlessly into your Microsoft 365 and Azure environment, delivering an end-to-end transformation of your expense management and finance reconciliation lifecycle.
Lightning-Fast Submission in the Flow of Work
Employees can submit expenses directly throughMicrosoft Teams or Outlook by simply uploading a photo or forwarding an email, drastically improving user experience..
Optical Character Recognition (OCR) instantly and accurately extracts all relevant data (vendor, amount, date, currency) from receipt images, eliminating manual data entry and errors.
The Copilot checks the expense against internal company policies (e.g., spending limits, date constraints) in real-time before submission, flagging issues for instant correction.
SmartExpense identifies and corrects policy violations (like missing data or out-of-policy claims) before submission, reducing administrative workload for finance teams.
Automatically generates clean, traceable audit trails and summaries for every transaction, ensuring solid compliance and readiness for financial audits.
Inherits your Microsoft 365 security, compliance, and privacy policies, ensuring your financial data is protected and remains secure within your organization’s environment.
AI intelligently maps each expense to the correct General Ledger (GL) codes and cost centers, eliminating manual tagging for employees and accountants alike.
Approvers receive instant notifications and can approve or reject reports directly from their Outlook inbox or a Teams, ultimately shortening approval cycles.
SmartExpense reviews transactions across systems to quickly spot anomalies, risks, and unmatched data, saving significant hours on manual reconciliation efforts.
By automating submission, compliance, and approval, SmartExpense Copilot shortens the reimbursement process from days to just hours.

Finance teams and executives can generate complex reports and performance dashboards by simply asking questions in natural, conversational language (e.g., "Summarize top 5 expense categories this quarter").
UnlockAI-driven analytics to spot spending patterns, policy violators, and vendor inefficiencies, empowering your team to forecast budgets and identify cost-saving opportunities.
